landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate platform for professionals to find, match, and apply for high-impact opportunities worldwide. Stop searching, start matching with Pathew Assistant.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Simple, credit-based pricing. Pay for what you create.

footer.tagline: The premium platform for global opportunity matching. Empowering professionals with Pathew Assistant.

problem.subtitle: You've spent weeks on proposals. You've sent countless emails. You've waited for months only to get a generic rejection with no feedback. The problem isn't your vision—it's the language of funders you haven't mastered.
problem.b1: Stop wasting time on mismatched opportunities.
problem.b2: Master the specific language of global funders.
problem.b3: Apply 10x faster with Assistant-trained success patterns.

landing.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools designed to accelerate your career growth.

featuresList.title: Global Discovery
featuresList.desc: Aggregated opportunities from thousands of premium sources worldwide.

featuresList.title: Assistant Match Scoring
featuresList.desc: Know exactly how well you fit before you even click apply.

featuresList.title: Smart Document Generation
featuresList.desc: Auto-generate CVs and cover letters tailored to each opportunity.

featuresList.title: Privacy First
featuresList.desc: Your data is encrypted and only shared when you choose to apply.

landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Your journey to a better career in three simple steps.

steps.title: Complete Your Profile
steps.desc: Share your story, achievements, and goals through our intuitive onboarding wizard.

steps.title: Get Matched
steps.desc: Our Assistant engine scans thousands of opportunities to find your perfect fit.

steps.title: Apply with Confidence
steps.desc: Use smart-generated documents to stand out and land your dream role.

compare.subtitle: Unlike generic tools, our system is trained on over $50M in successful global opportunity applications.

landing.creditSubtitle: Mix and match any service — credits work across your entire account.
landing.trustpilot: See why thousands of professionals trust us

faqList.question: How does Pathew Assistant match me to opportunities?
faqList.answer: Our advanced Assistant engine analyzes your profile against thousands of data points in opportunity descriptions to provide a precision match score.

faqList.question: Is my personal data secure?
faqList.answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption. Your full profile is only shared with recruiters when you explicitly choose to apply.

faqList.question: Can I use the platform for free?
faqList.answer: Absolutely! Our Free plan allows you to explore matches and make up to 3 applications per month.

hero.subtitle: Discover how our advanced Assistant technology bridges the gap between your talent and global opportunities.

process.title: A 3-Step Journey
process.subtitle: We've simplified the complex world of international applications into three powerful stages.

step1.title: Global Discovery
step1.desc: Our engine scans thousands of curated sources to find opportunities specifically matched to your unique profile.

step2.title: Assistant Analysis
step2.desc: The PATHEW Assistant evaluates your gaps, suggests improvements, and generates tailored application documents.

step3.title: Direct Application
step3.desc: Apply with confidence using optimized materials that stand out to selection committees and employers.

story.p1: PATHEW started as a small internal tool used by international researchers to find funding. We quickly realized that the biggest barrier to global success wasn't talent—it was access to information and the ability to package that talent effectively.
story.p2: Today, we empower thousands of professionals across 120+ countries to navigate the complex landscape of fellowships, grants, and high-impact roles with ease and precision.

team.title: The 3-Man Core
team.subtitle: Meet the visionaries behind the PATHEW Assistant engine.
team.desc1: The visionary behind PATHEW, dedicated to breaking down geographical barriers for talent worldwide.
team.desc2: Product strategist focused on building intuitive Assistant tools that empower professional growth.
team.desc3: Strategic lead for global expansion, ensuring the PATHEW Assistant reaches every corner of the globe.

cta.title: Ready to bridge the gap?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals already using PATHEW to accelerate their careers.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.p: We collect your name and email address when you create an account. For your profile, we may collect professional history, skills, and goals to provide better matching services.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Data
sections.p: Your data is used to calculate match scores with global opportunities and to communicate relevant updates. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.title: 3. Data Protection
sections.p: We implement industry-standard security measures, including data encryption and secure server protocols, to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.

sections.title: 4. Your Rights
sections.p: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can manage these settings directly through your profile dashboard.

sections.title: 5. Cookies
sections.p: We use essential cookies to maintain your login session and improve platform performance. Non-essential cookies are only used with your explicit consent.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.p: By accessing and using PATHEW Assistant, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Account Registration
sections.p: To access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

sections.title: 3. Use of Services
sections.p: Our services are intended for professional opportunity matching. You agree not to use the platform for any unlawful purposes or in any way that could damage or disable our infrastructure.

sections.title: 4. Data & Privacy
sections.p: Your use of PATHEW is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review it to understand how we collect and process your information.

sections.title: 5. Termination
sections.p: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our discretion if we believe you have violated these terms.
